title: Pairwise Poisson Algebras of the N-Body Problem
description: Symbolic and numerical computation of the Lie algebra generated by pairwise interaction Hamiltonians of the N-body problem under the Poisson bracket. Establishes the dimension sequence [3, 6, 17, 116] for N=3 and its universality across potentials, spatial dimensions, mass ratios, and charge magnitudes; extends to N=4 ([6, 14, 62, 1260]) and higher N at level 2. Cross-CAS verified in SymPy and Wolfram Language. Includes the algebra engine, multi-system survey scripts, AWS atlas-scan infrastructure, structure-constant analyses, and the LaTeX sources of the accompanying paper series.
